inputs.label: Culvert Diameter
inputs.businessContext: The internal diameter of the circular culvert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The internal diameter of the circular culvert.

inputs.label: Discharge Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of discharge for the culvert inlet, typically 0.6-0.8.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient of discharge for the culvert inlet, typically 0.6-0.8.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Menfez girişi için debi katsayısı, tipik olarak 0,6-0,8.

inputs.label: Effective Head
inputs.businessContext: Difference between upstream water surface elevation and the center of the culvert outlet (for outlet control) or inlet (for inlet control). For submerged inlet control, H = HW - D/2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Difference between upstream water surface elevation and the center of the culvert outlet (for outlet control) or inlet (for inlet control). For submerged inlet control, H = HW - D/2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Memba su yüzeyi kotu ile menfez çıkışının (çıkış kontrolü için) veya girişinin (giriş kontrolü için) merkezi arasındaki fark. Batık giriş kontrolü için H = HW - D/2.

inputs.label: Gravitational Acceleration
inputs.businessContext: Standard gravity, can be adjusted if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard gravity, can be adjusted if needed.

inputs.label: Number of Barrels
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical culvert barrels in parallel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical culvert barrels in parallel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paralel olarak aynı menfez varil sayısı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
